questions: how to get started with ui design
difference between ui and graphic design
answers: UI design (User Interface Design) focuses on the visual elements of a product — buttons, icons, colors, layouts, and typography. It's about making interfaces look beautiful and functional.
UI design holo product er visual part niye kaj kora. Button kothay bosbe, color ki hobe, font kemon hobe — eishob UI designer decide kore.
UI design is all about crafting the look and feel of an app or website. Tools like Figma, Sketch, and Adobe XD are commonly used. Start by studying design systems and practicing daily.
A UI designer creates the visual layout users interact with. It includes choosing color schemes, designing components, and ensuring consistency across all screens of the product.
